source: nginxinc/nginx-prometheus-exporter v1.x (github.com/nginxinc/nginx-prometheus-exporter) — full metric set for OSS nginx mode (nginx_*). NGINX Plus metrics (nginxplus_*) intentionally omitted from this whitelist; add via PR if your manual covers Plus.
method: From the exporter README's documented metric tables (oss-stub_status mode).
